message: Stalls near the market still flood when it rains; drains are clogged.
Shortage of malaria test kits reported last week.
Some bursary applicants have not received SMS confirmation.
Borehole at Nyasanda has intermittent outages.
Interest in the next skills training is high; request for schedule.
Potholes reappeared after rains on the Uloma stretch.
Vendors asking for waste bins replacement on the east wing.
Low pressure reported in Obambo area.
